goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'sunday' and should 'arrive by 11:30'.
The train should depart from 'kings lynn' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'regency gallery'.
Make sure you get 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on sunday and should arrive by 11:30
The train should depart from kings lynn and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get train ID
You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called regency gallery
